title: Pekit's Bows to Guns - WWII
description: This pack turns the bow/crossbow into WWII era weapons
body:
Inspired by [Scarecrow01](https://www.curseforge.com/members/scarecrow01/projects)'s Flintl0cks pack, this pack turns the crossbow and bow into guns from the WWII era like the Karbiner 98k and Walther P38.
Comes with custom sound effects!


![Image of Crossbow and Bow Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5aff6574844a5bd81ca7f2abd117db88f92054.png)



If you like this pack, you can follow me on:

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/PekitP)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pekitp/projects)

[PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/pekitp/)
